Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***********************************************************************************

 Eilenberg-Moore objects

 In this file, we study Eilenberg-Moore objects internal to arbitrary
 bicategories. This generalizes Eilenberg-Moore categories to arbitrary
 bicategories.

 We present three equivalent definitions. The first one expresses Eilenberg-Moore
 objects using universal properties. The second definition coincides with universal
 arrows, and it is remniscent of the work by Street (Formal Theory of Monads) where
 Eilenberg-Moore objects are defined as a right adjoint of the inclusion
 pseudofunctor of `B` into `mnd B`. The third definition is another reformulation
 where Eilenberg-Moore categories are used.

 Contents
 1. Definition via universal properties
 1.1 Cones and morphisms of cones
 1.2 The mapping properties
 1.3 It is a proposition
 2. Definition similar to universal arrows
 2.1 The functor
 2.2 The definition
 2.3 It is a proposition
 3. Equivalence of the first two definitions
 4. Definition via Eilenberg-Moore category
 4.1 The functor
 4.2 The definition
 4.3 It is a proposition
 5. Equivalence to the other two definitions
 6. Bicategories with Eilenberg-Moore objects

 ***********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.EilenbergMoore.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.CompositesAndInverses.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.TransportLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.Examples.ToMonadInCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.MonadsLax.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.MonadInclusion.

Local Open Scope cat.


B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (# (mnd_incl B) g · h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (mnd_incl B) z · h) p)) =
## (mnd_incl B) (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) ▹ h


B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
p: f = g
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (# (mnd_incl B) g · h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (mnd_incl B) z · h) p)) =
## (mnd_incl B) (idtoiso_2_1 f g p) ▹ h

  
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (mnd_incl B) z · h)
        (idpath f))) =
## (mnd_incl B) (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) ▹ h

  
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
## (mnd_incl B) (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) ▹ h =
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (mnd_incl B) z · h)
        (idpath f)))

  
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
## (mnd_incl B) (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) ▹ h = ?b
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (mnd_incl B) z · h)
        (idpath f)))

  
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
## (mnd_incl B) (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) ▹ h = ?b

    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
## (mnd_incl B) (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) = ?t2

    apply psfunctor_id2.
  
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
m: mnd B
h: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B b, m ⟧
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) f) ▹ h =
pr1
  (idtoiso_2_1 (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (# (mnd_incl B) f · h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : B ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (mnd_incl B) z · h)
        (idpath f)))

  apply id2_rwhisker.
Qed.

Section EMObject.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (m : mnd B).

  (**
   1. Definition via universal properties
   *)

  (**
    1.1 Cones and morphisms of cones
   *)
  Definition em_cone
    : UU
    := ∑ (x : B), mnd_incl B x --> m.

  Section MakeCone.
    Context (x : B)
            (f : x --> ob_of_mnd m)
            (fm : f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f)
            (fη : linvunitor f = rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m) • fm)
            (fμ : lassociator _ _ _
                  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
                  • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
                  • fm
                  =
                  (f ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
                  • fm).

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m

m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
?f · endo_of_mnd m ==> endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x) · ?f

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
 exact f.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
f · endo_of_mnd m ==> endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x) · f
 exact fm.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_laws make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_laws make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
linvunitor (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data)
• (unit_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
   ▹ pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data)
 • (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
((((lassociator (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data)
      (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • (pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
       (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data) (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
     ◃ pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
     (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data))
• (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
   ▹ pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data) =
(pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
linvunitor (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data)
• (unit_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
   ▹ pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data)
 • (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
linvunitor f • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ f) =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
linvunitor f • id₂ (id₁ x · f) =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm

        exact fη.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
((((lassociator (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data)
      (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • (pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
       (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data) (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
     ◃ pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
     (pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data))
• (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
   ▹ pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data) =
(pr1 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• pr2 make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
((((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
   • rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (id₁ x ◃ fm)) • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f)
• (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f) = (f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
      • ((id₁ x ◃ fm)
         • (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) f
            • (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ f))))) =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
      • ((id₁ x ◃ fm) • lunitor (id₁ x · f)))) =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (lunitor (f · endo_of_mnd m) • fm))) =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (lunitor (f · endo_of_mnd m) • fm))) = ?b
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
?b = (f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (lunitor (f · endo_of_mnd m) • fm))) = ?b

          
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
• (lunitor (f · endo_of_mnd m) • fm) = ?t2

 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
(rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
 • lunitor (f · endo_of_mnd m)) • fm = ?t2

 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =

(rassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
 • (lassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m)
    • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))) • fm = ?t2

  • lassociator (id₁ x) f (endo_of_mnd m))

 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm = ?t2

 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =

(lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m) • fm = ?t2

          apply idpath.

        exact fμ.

em_cone

x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧

em_cone

mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧

 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm

  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_laws ?f

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m
 exact make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, ob_of_mnd m ⟧
fm: f · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ x · f
fη: linvunitor f =
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • fm
fμ: ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • fm =
(f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • fm
mnd_mor_laws make_em_cone_mnd_mor_data
 exact make_em_cone_mnd_mor_laws.
    Defined.
  End MakeCone.

  Coercion em_cone_to_ob (e : em_cone) : B := pr1 e.

  Definition mor_of_em_cone (e : em_cone) : mnd_incl B e --> m := pr2 e.

  Definition em_cone_mor
             (e₁ e₂ : em_cone)
    : UU
    := ∑ (g : e₁ --> e₂),
       invertible_2cell
         (# (mnd_incl B) g · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
         (mor_of_em_cone e₁).

  Definition make_em_cone_mor
             {e₁ e₂ : em_cone}
             (g : e₁ --> e₂)
             (α : invertible_2cell
                    (# (mnd_incl B) g · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
                    (mor_of_em_cone e₁))
    : em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
    := g ,, α.

  Coercion mor_of_em_cone_mor
           {e₁ e₂ : em_cone}
           (f : em_cone_mor e₁ e₂)
    : e₁ --> e₂
    := pr1 f.

  Definition cell_of_em_cone_mor
             {e₁ e₂ : em_cone}
             (f : em_cone_mor e₁ e₂)
    : invertible_2cell
        (# (mnd_incl B) f · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
        (mor_of_em_cone e₁)
    := pr2 f.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
f₁ = f₂

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
f₁ = f₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
pr1 f₁ = pr1 f₂
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
   invertible_2cell
     (# (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
     (mor_of_em_cone e₁)) ?p (pr2 f₁) = pr2 f₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
pr1 f₁ = pr1 f₂
 exact (isotoid_2_1 HB α).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
   invertible_2cell
     (# (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
     (mor_of_em_cone e₁)) (isotoid_2_1 HB α) (pr2 f₁) =
pr2 f₂

pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
      invertible_2cell
        (# (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
        (mor_of_em_cone e₁)) (isotoid_2_1 HB α)

isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

        intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.

m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

pr12 f₁

  (transportf
     (λ x : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
      invertible_2cell
        (# (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂)

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
      invertible_2cell
        (# (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
        (mor_of_em_cone e₁)) (isotoid_2_1 HB α)

B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
?b = pr12 f₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
      invertible_2cell
        (# (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
        (mor_of_em_cone e₁)) (isotoid_2_1 HB α)
     (pr2 f₁)) = ?b

        apply (@pr1_transportf
                 (e₁ --> e₂)
                 (λ x, # (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂ ==> mor_of_em_cone e₁)).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
   # (mnd_incl B) x · mor_of_em_cone e₂ ==>
   mor_of_em_cone e₁) (isotoid_2_1 HB α) (pr12 f₁) =
pr12 f₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(idtoiso_2_1
   (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
   (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
   (maponpaths
      (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
       # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (isotoid_2_1 HB α))) ^-1
• (pr12 f₁
   • idtoiso_2_1 (mor_of_em_cone e₁)
       (mor_of_em_cone e₁)
       (maponpaths
          (λ _ : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧, mor_of_em_cone e₁)
          (isotoid_2_1 HB α))) = pr12 f₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(idtoiso_2_1
   (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
   (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
   (maponpaths
      (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
       # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (isotoid_2_1 HB α))) ^-1
• (pr12 f₁
   • idtoiso_2_1 (mor_of_em_cone e₁)
       (mor_of_em_cone e₁)
       (idpath (mor_of_em_cone e₁))) = pr12 f₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
pr12 f₁
• idtoiso_2_1 (mor_of_em_cone e₁) (mor_of_em_cone e₁)
    (idpath (mor_of_em_cone e₁)) =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (idtoiso_2_1
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
          # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
         (isotoid_2_1 HB α)))) ^-1 • pr12 f₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
pr12 f₁ =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (idtoiso_2_1
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
          # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
         (isotoid_2_1 HB α)))) ^-1 • pr12 f₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (idtoiso_2_1
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
          # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
         (isotoid_2_1 HB α)))) ^-1 • pr12 f₂ = pr12 f₁

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (idtoiso_2_1
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
          # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
         (isotoid_2_1 HB α)))) ^-1 • pr12 f₂ = ?b
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
?b = pr12 f₁

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (idtoiso_2_1
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
          # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
         (isotoid_2_1 HB α)))) ^-1 • pr12 f₂ = ?b

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (idtoiso_2_1
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₁) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 f₂) · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧,
          # (mnd_incl B) z · mor_of_em_cone e₂)
         (isotoid_2_1 HB α)))) ^-1 = ?y'

        exact (idtoiso_mnd_incl (isotoid_2_1 HB α) m (mor_of_em_cone e₂)).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(## (mnd_incl B)
   (idtoiso_2_1 f₁ f₂ (isotoid_2_1 HB α))
 ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ = pr12 f₁

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e₁, e₂: em_cone
f₁, f₂: em_cone_mor e₁ e₂
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
p: (## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁
(## (mnd_incl B) α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e₂) • pr12 f₂ =
pr12 f₁

      exact p.
  Qed.

  (**
   1.2 The mapping properties
   *)
  Definition em_ump_1
             (e : em_cone)
    : UU
    := ∏ (q : em_cone), em_cone_mor q e.

  Definition em_ump_2
             (e : em_cone)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : B)
         (g₁ g₂ : x --> e)
         (α : # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e
              ==>
              # (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e),
      ∃! (β : g₁ ==> g₂), ## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ _ = α.

  Definition has_em_ump
             (e : em_cone)
    : UU
    := em_ump_1 e × em_ump_2 e.

  Section MappingProperties.
    Context {e : em_cone}
            (He : has_em_ump e).

    Definition em_ump_1_mor
               (q : em_cone)
      : q --> e
      := pr1 He q.

    Definition em_ump_1_inv2cell
               (q : em_cone)
      : invertible_2cell
          (# (mnd_incl B) (em_ump_1_mor q) · mor_of_em_cone e)
          (mor_of_em_cone q)
      := cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 He q).

    Definition em_ump_2_cell
               {x : B}
               {g₁ g₂ : x --> e}
               (α : # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e
                    ==>
                    # (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
      : g₁ ==> g₂
      := pr11 (pr2 He x g₁ g₂ α).

    Definition em_ump_2_eq
               {x : B}
               {g₁ g₂ : x --> e}
               (α : # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e
                    ==>
                    # (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
      : ## (mnd_incl B) (em_ump_2_cell α) ▹ _ = α
      := pr21 (pr2 He x g₁ g₂ α).

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
β₁, β₂: g₁ ==> g₂
Hβ₁: ## (mnd_incl B) β₁ ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
Hβ₂: ## (mnd_incl B) β₂ ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
β₁ = β₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
β₁, β₂: g₁ ==> g₂
Hβ₁: ## (mnd_incl B) β₁ ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
Hβ₂: ## (mnd_incl B) β₂ ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
β₁ = β₂

      exact (maponpaths
               pr1
               (pr1 (isapropifcontr (pr2 He x g₁ g₂ α) (β₁ ,, Hβ₁) (β₂ ,, Hβ₂)))).
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_invertible_2cell (em_ump_2_cell α)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_invertible_2cell (em_ump_2_cell α)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
g₂ ==> g₁
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
em_ump_2_cell α • ?φ = id₂ g₁
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
?φ • em_ump_2_cell α = id₂ g₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
g₂ ==> g₁
 exact (em_ump_2_cell Hα^-1).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
em_ump_2_cell α • em_ump_2_cell Hα ^-1 = id₂ g₁
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B)
  (em_ump_2_cell α • em_ump_2_cell Hα ^-1)
▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B) (id₂ g₁) ▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B)
  (em_ump_2_cell α • em_ump_2_cell Hα ^-1)
▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
 abstract
            (rewrite psfunctor_vcomp ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !em_ump_2_eq ;
             apply vcomp_rinv).
        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B) (id₂ g₁) ▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
 abstract
            (rewrite psfunctor_id2 ;
             apply id2_rwhisker).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
em_ump_2_cell Hα ^-1 • em_ump_2_cell α = id₂ g₂
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B)
  (em_ump_2_cell Hα ^-1 • em_ump_2_cell α)
▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B) (id₂ g₂) ▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B)
  (em_ump_2_cell Hα ^-1 • em_ump_2_cell α)
▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
 abstract
            (rewrite psfunctor_vcomp ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !em_ump_2_eq ;
             apply vcomp_linv).
        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
## (mnd_incl B) (id₂ g₂) ▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
id₂ (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
 abstract
            (rewrite psfunctor_id2 ;
             apply id2_rwhisker).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: invertible_2cell
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
invertible_2cell g₁ g₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: invertible_2cell
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
invertible_2cell g₁ g₂

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: invertible_2cell
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
g₁ ==> g₂
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: invertible_2cell
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: invertible_2cell
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
g₁ ==> g₂
 exact (em_ump_2_cell α).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: invertible_2cell
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e)
  (# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e)
is_invertible_2cell (em_ump_2_cell α)
 exact (em_ump_2_cell_is_invertible _ (pr2 α)).
    Defined.
  End MappingProperties.

  (**
   1.3 It is a proposition
   *)
  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (has_em_ump e)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (has_em_ump e)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isProofIrrelevant (has_em_ump e)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
φ₁ = φ₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
isPredicate (λ _ : em_ump_1 e, em_ump_2 e)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
isPredicate (λ _ : em_ump_1 e, em_ump_2 e)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
x: em_ump_1 e
isaprop (em_ump_2 e)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
x: em_ump_1 e
t: B
t0, t1: B ⟦ t, e ⟧
t2: # (mnd_incl B) t0 · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) t1 · mor_of_em_cone e
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t2 : # (mnd_incl B) t0 · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
           # (mnd_incl B) t1 · mor_of_em_cone e,
    ∃! β : t0 ==> t1,
    ## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = t2) t2)

      apply isapropiscontr.
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
pr1 φ₁ ~ pr1 φ₂

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
pr1 φ₁ q = pr1 φ₂ q

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
invertible_2cell (pr1 φ₁ q) (pr1 φ₂ q)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
(## (mnd_incl B) ?α ▹ mor_of_em_cone e)
• pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q) = pr12 (pr1 φ₁ q)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
invertible_2cell (pr1 φ₁ q) (pr1 φ₂ q)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
invertible_2cell
  (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 φ₁ q) · mor_of_em_cone e)
  (# (mnd_incl B) (pr1 φ₂ q) · mor_of_em_cone e)

      exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q))
               (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                  (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q)))).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
(## (mnd_incl B)
   (em_ump_2_inv2cell φ₁
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q))
         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
            (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q)))))
 ▹ mor_of_em_cone e) • pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q) =
pr12 (pr1 φ₁ q)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
(## (mnd_incl B)
   (em_ump_2_inv2cell φ₁
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q))
         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
            (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q)))))
 ▹ mor_of_em_cone e) • pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q) = ?b
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
?b = pr12 (pr1 φ₁ q)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
(## (mnd_incl B)
   (em_ump_2_inv2cell φ₁
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q))
         (inv_of_invertible_2cell
            (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q)))))
 ▹ mor_of_em_cone e) • pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q) = ?b

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
## (mnd_incl B)
  (em_ump_2_inv2cell φ₁
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q)))))
▹ mor_of_em_cone e = ?y'

        apply em_ump_2_eq.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q))
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q)))
• pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q) = pr12 (pr1 φ₁ q)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q)
• (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q))
   • pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q)) = pr12 (pr1 φ₁ q)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q)
• (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q))
   • pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q)) = ?b
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
?b = pr12 (pr1 φ₁ q)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q)
• (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q))
   • pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q)) = ?b

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
inv_of_invertible_2cell
  (cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₂ q)) • pr12 (pr1 φ₂ q) =
?t2

        apply (vcomp_linv (pr2 (pr1 φ₂ q))).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
φ₁, φ₂: has_em_ump e
q: em_cone
cell_of_em_cone_mor (pr1 φ₁ q)
• id₂ (mor_of_em_cone q) = pr12 (pr1 φ₁ q)

      apply id2_right.
  Qed.

  (**
   2. Definition similar to universal arrows
   *)

  (**
   2.1 The functor
   *)
  Section EilenbergMooreFunctor.
    Context (e : em_cone)
            (x : B).

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
?f · endo_of_mnd m ==> endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x) · ?f

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
 exact (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) · endo_of_mnd m ==>
endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
· (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
               • (_ ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))
               • (_ ◃ lunitor _)
               • linvunitor _).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
mnd_mor_laws (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
mnd_mor_laws (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
linvunitor (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f))
• (unit_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
   ▹ pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f))
 • (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f) ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• pr2 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
((((lassociator (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f))
      (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • (pr2 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f) ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
       (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f))
       (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
     ◃ pr2 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x))
     (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)))
• (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
   ▹ pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)) =
(pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f) ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• pr2 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
linvunitor (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f))
• (unit_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
   ▹ pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f))
 • (pr1 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f) ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• pr2 (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)

   (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)
 • (f
    ◃ (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)
       ◃ mult_of_mnd m)))
• (f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))

e: em_cone
x: B

e: em_cone

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m
 exact (em_hom_functor_ob_data f).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
mnd_mor_laws (em_hom_functor_ob_data f)
 exact (em_hom_functor_ob_laws f).
    Defined.

    Definition em_hom_functor_mor_data
               {f g : x --> e}
               (α : f ==> g)
      : mnd_cell_data (em_hom_functor_ob f) (em_hom_functor_ob g)
      := α ▹ _.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_mnd_cell (em_hom_functor_mor_data α)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_mnd_cell (em_hom_functor_mor_data α)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
(((rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
  • (f ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))
 • linvunitor (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• (id₁ x ◃ em_hom_functor_mor_data α) =
(em_hom_functor_mor_data α ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• (((rassociator g (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
       (endo_of_mnd m)
     • (g ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
    • (g ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))
   • linvunitor
       (g · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
(((rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
  • (f ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))
 • linvunitor (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• (id₁ x ◃ (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))) =
((α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• (((rassociator g (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
       (endo_of_mnd m)
     • (g ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
    • (g ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))
   • linvunitor
       (g · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
(((rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
  • (f ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))
 • linvunitor (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• (id₁ x ◃ (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))) =
(((((α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • rassociator g (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
       (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (g ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
 • (g ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))
• linvunitor (g · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

α: f ==> g
(((rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
  • (f ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))
 • linvunitor (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• (id₁ x ◃ (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))) =
(((rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (α
      ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)
        · endo_of_mnd m))
  • (g ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)))
 • (g ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))
   • ((f ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
      • (linvunitor
           (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
         • (id₁ x
            ◃ (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))))) =
rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((α
    ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)
      · endo_of_mnd m)
   • ((g ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))
      • ((g
          ◃ lunitor
              (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
         • linvunitor
             (g · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
(f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))
• ((f ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
   • (linvunitor
        (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
      • (id₁ x
         ◃ (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))) =
(α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) · endo_of_mnd m)
• ((g ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))
   • ((g ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
      • linvunitor
          (g · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))

m: mnd B

(f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))

        (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
      • (id₁ x

?b

?b =

        apply idpath.

x: B

(f ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e))

      • linvunitor

  (em_hom_functor_ob g)

mnd_cell_data (em_hom_functor_ob f)
  (em_hom_functor_ob g)
 exact (em_hom_functor_mor_data α).

e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_mnd_cell (em_hom_functor_mor_data α)
 exact (em_hom_functor_mor_is_mnd_cell α).

B: bicat

functor_data (hom x e) (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)

x: B
hom x e → hom (mnd_incl B x) m

m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
∏ a b : hom x e,
hom x e ⟦ a, b ⟧ → hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
hom x e → hom (mnd_incl B x) m
 exact em_hom_functor_ob.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
∏ a b : hom x e,
hom x e ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ em_hom_functor_ob a,
  em_hom_functor_ob b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ α, em_hom_functor_mor α).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B

x: B
is_functor em_hom_functor_data

m: mnd B
e: em_cone

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
# em_hom_functor_data (id₁ f) =
id₁ (em_hom_functor_data f)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
em_hom_functor_mor_data (id₂ f) =
id₂ (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
id₂ f ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) =
id₂ (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

        apply id2_rwhisker.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_compax em_hom_functor_data
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g, h: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom x e ⟦ g, h ⟧
# em_hom_functor_data (α · β) =
# em_hom_functor_data α · # em_hom_functor_data β

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g, h: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom x e ⟦ g, h ⟧
em_hom_functor_mor_data (α • β) =
em_hom_functor_mor_data α • em_hom_functor_mor_data β

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g, h: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom x e ⟦ g, h ⟧
(α • β) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) =
(α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
• (β ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g, h: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom x e ⟦ g, h ⟧
(α • β) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) =
(α • β) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)

        apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End EilenbergMooreFunctor.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
hom x e ⟶ hom (mnd_incl B x) m

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
hom x e ⟶ hom (mnd_incl B x) m

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_data (hom x e) (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_functor ?F

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_data (hom x e) (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
 exact (em_hom_functor_data e x).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_functor (em_hom_functor_data e x)
 exact (em_hom_functor_is_functor e x).
  Defined.

  (**
   2.2 The definition
   *)
  Definition is_universal_em_cone
             (e : em_cone)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : B), adj_equivalence_of_cats (em_hom_functor e x).

  (**
   2.3 It is a proposition
   *)
  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_universal_em_cone e)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_universal_em_cone e)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t : B,
    adj_equivalence_of_cats (em_hom_functor e t)) x)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
UU
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
?X ≃ adj_equivalence_of_cats (em_hom_functor e x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
isofhlevel 1 ?X

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
UU
 exact (@left_adjoint_equivalence
               bicat_of_univ_cats
               (univ_hom HB_2_1 x e)
               (univ_hom (is_univalent_2_1_mnd _ HB_2_1) (mnd_incl B x) m)
               (em_hom_functor e x)).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
left_adjoint_equivalence (em_hom_functor e x)
≃ adj_equivalence_of_cats (em_hom_functor e x)
 exact (@adj_equiv_is_equiv_cat
               (univ_hom HB_2_1 x e)
               _
               _).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
isofhlevel 1
  (left_adjoint_equivalence (em_hom_functor e x))
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_of_univ_cats

      exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_1.
  Qed.

  (**
   3. Equivalence of the two definitions
   *)
  Section UMPIsUniversal.
    Context {e : em_cone}
            (He : has_em_ump e)
            (x : B).

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (hom x e)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (hom x e)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m → hom x e
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
∏ a b : hom (mnd_incl B x) m,
hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ a, b ⟧ → hom x e ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m → hom x e
 exact (λ f, em_ump_1_mor He (x ,, f)).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
∏ a b : hom (mnd_incl B x) m,
hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ hom x e
  ⟦ (λ f : hom (mnd_incl B x) m,
     em_ump_1_mor He (x,, f)) a,
  (λ f : hom (mnd_incl B x) m, em_ump_1_mor He (x,, f))
    b ⟧
 exact (λ f g α,
               em_ump_2_cell
                 He
                 (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x ,, f)
                  • α
                  • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x ,, g))^-1)).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
is_functor has_em_ump_right_adjoint_data

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
is_functor has_em_ump_right_adjoint_data

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
functor_idax has_em_ump_right_adjoint_data
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e

• (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, h)) ^-1 =
β • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, h)) ^-1

          
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
f, g, h: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
α: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ g, h ⟧
(id₂ g • β) • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, h)) ^-1 =
β • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, h)) ^-1

          
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
f, g, h: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
α: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ g, h ⟧
β • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, h)) ^-1 =
β • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, h)) ^-1

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

 exact has_em_ump_right_adjoint_is_functor.
    Defined.

    Definition unit_help_data
               (f : x --> e)
      : mnd_cell_data
          (# (mnd_incl B) (functor_identity (hom x e) f) · mor_of_em_cone e)
          (mor_of_em_cone (x,, em_hom_functor_ob e x f))
      := id2 _.

       · mor_of_em_cone e)) ▹ endo_of_mnd m)

 exact (unit_help_is_mnd_cell f).
    Defined.

    Definition has_em_ump_unit_data
      : nat_trans_data
          (functor_identity (hom x e))
          (em_hom_functor e x ∙ has_em_ump_right_adjoint)
      := λ f, em_ump_2_cell
                He
                (unit_help f • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, em_hom_functor_ob e x f))^-1).

m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
is_nat_trans (functor_identity (hom x e))
  (em_hom_functor e x ∙ has_em_ump_right_adjoint)
  has_em_ump_unit_data

e: em_cone

x: B
is_nat_trans (functor_identity (hom x e))
  (em_hom_functor e x ∙ has_em_ump_right_adjoint)
  has_em_ump_unit_data

· has_em_ump_unit_data f₂ =
has_em_ump_unit_data f₁
· # (em_hom_functor e x ∙ has_em_ump_right_adjoint) α

· mor_of_em_cone e ==>

· mor_of_em_cone e

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
f₁, f₂: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
f₁, f₂: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
is_mnd_cell (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
 abstract
            (red ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             etrans ;
               [ do 3 apply maponpaths ;
                 rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
                 rewrite <- linvunitor_natural ;
                 apply idpath
               | ] ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite <- vcomp_whisker ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
             apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
f₁, f₂: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
## (mnd_incl B)
  (# (functor_identity (hom x e)) α
   · has_em_ump_unit_data f₂) ▹ mor_of_em_cone e =
(unit_help f₁
 • make_mnd_cell
     (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (has_em_ump_unit_is_nat_trans_subproof f₁ f₂ α))
• (em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, em_hom_functor_ob e x f₂))
  ^-1

  (## (mnd_incl B)

cell_of_mnd_cell
  ((unit_help f₁
    • make_mnd_cell
        (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
        (has_em_ump_unit_is_nat_trans_subproof f₁ f₂ α))
   • (em_ump_1_inv2cell He
        (x,, em_hom_functor_ob e x f₂)) ^-1)

• pr1

    Defined.

    Definition counit_help_data
               (f : hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
      : mnd_cell_data
          (em_hom_functor e x (em_ump_1_mor He (x,, f)))
          (# (mnd_incl B) (em_ump_1_mor He (x,, f)) · mor_of_em_cone e)
      := id2 _.

 exact (counit_help_data f).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: has_em_ump e
x: B
f: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
is_mnd_cell (counit_help_data f)
 exact (counit_help_is_mnd_cell f).
    Defined.

    Definition has_em_ump_counit_data
      : nat_trans_data
          (has_em_ump_right_adjoint ∙ em_hom_functor e x)
          (functor_identity _)
      := λ f, counit_help f • em_ump_1_inv2cell He (x,, f).

is_nat_trans
  (has_em_ump_right_adjoint ∙ em_hom_functor e x)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m))
  has_em_ump_counit_data

    Definition has_em_ump_adj_equivalence_of_cats

  End UMPIsUniversal.

  Defined.

  Section IsUniversalHasUMP.
    Context {e : em_cone}
            (He : is_universal_em_cone e).

    Definition is_universal_has_em_ump_1_help_cell_data
               (q : em_cone)
      : mnd_cell_data
          (# (mnd_incl B) (right_adjoint (He q) (mor_of_em_cone q)) · mor_of_em_cone e)
          (em_hom_functor_ob e q (right_adjoint (He q) (mor_of_em_cone q)))
      := id2 _.

          is_iso.
    Defined.

    Section UMP2.
      Context {x : B}
              {g₁ g₂ : x --> e}
              (α : # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e
                   ==>
                   # (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e).

      Let H : fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
        := fully_faithful_from_equivalence _ _ _ (He x).

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
isaprop
  (∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
   ## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
isaprop
  (∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
   ## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α)

H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
   ## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e

  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
β₁, β₂: ∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
β₁ = β₂

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B

  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
β₁, β₂: ∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : g₁ ==> g₂,
   ## (mnd_incl B) x0 ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α)

β₁, β₂: ∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
pr1 β₁ = pr1 β₂

x0: g₁ ==> g₂
isaprop (## (mnd_incl B) x0 ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α)

          apply cellset_property.
        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧

  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
β₁, β₂: ∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
make_weq # (em_hom_functor e x) (H g₁ g₂) (pr1 β₁) =
make_weq # (em_hom_functor e x) (H g₁ g₂) (pr1 β₂)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
β₁, β₂: ∑ β : g₁ ==> g₂,
## (mnd_incl B) β ▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α
cell_of_mnd_cell
  (make_weq # (em_hom_functor e x) (H g₁ g₂) (pr1 β₁)) =
cell_of_mnd_cell
  (make_weq # (em_hom_functor e x) (H g₁ g₂) (pr1 β₂))

        exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 β₁ @ !(pr2 β₂))).
      Qed.

      Definition is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell_mnd_cell_data
        : mnd_cell_data
            (em_hom_functor e x g₁)
            (em_hom_functor e x g₂)
        := pr1 α.

  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
is_mnd_cell

  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
mnd_mor_endo (em_hom_functor e x g₁)
• (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x) ◃ pr1 α) =
(pr1 α ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• mnd_mor_endo (em_hom_functor e x g₂)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
(((rassociator g₁ (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)

H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
p:= mnd_cell_endo α: ((((rassociator g₁ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e))
      (pr112 m) • (g₁ ◃ pr112 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
   • lassociator g₁ (id₁ e)
       (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
  • ((runitor g₁ • linvunitor g₁)
     ▹ pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
 • rassociator (id₁ x) g₁ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• (id₁ x ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell α) =
(cell_of_mnd_cell α ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• ((((rassociator g₂ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e))
        (pr112 m)
      • (g₂ ◃ pr112 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
     • lassociator g₂ (id₁ e)
         (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
    • ((runitor g₂ • linvunitor g₂)
       ▹ pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
   • rassociator (id₁ x) g₂
       (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
(g₁ ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• linvunitor (g₁ · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)) =
((lassociator g₁ (id₁ e) (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e))
  • (runitor g₁ ▹ pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
 • (linvunitor g₁ ▹ pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• rassociator (id₁ x) g₁ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e))

# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
p:= mnd_cell_endo α: ((((rassociator g₁ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e))
      (pr112 m) • (g₁ ◃ pr112 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
   • lassociator g₁ (id₁ e)
       (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
  • ((runitor g₁ • linvunitor g₁)
     ▹ pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
 • rassociator (id₁ x) g₁ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• (id₁ x ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell α) =
(cell_of_mnd_cell α ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• ((((rassociator g₂ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e))
        (pr112 m)
      • (g₂ ◃ pr112 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
     • lassociator g₂ (id₁ e)
         (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
    • ((runitor g₂ • linvunitor g₂)
       ▹ pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
   • rassociator (id₁ x) g₂
       (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
((g₂ ◃ lunitor (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
 • (linvunitor g₂ ▹ pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• rassociator (id₁ x) g₂ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e)) =
(g₂ ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))
• linvunitor (g₂ · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)

        (pr112 m)

   • rassociator (id₁ x) g₂ (pr1 (mor_of_em_cone e))) =

 exact is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell_mnd_cell_data.
        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e

  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
is_mnd_cell
  is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell_mnd_cell_data
 exact is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell_mnd_cell_is_mnd_cell.
      Defined.

      Definition is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell
        : g₁ ==> g₂
        := invmap (make_weq _ (H g₁ g₂)) is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell_mnd_cell.

## (mnd_incl B) is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell
▹ mor_of_em_cone e = α

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B

He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B

  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
## (mnd_incl B) is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell

B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: # (mnd_incl B) g₁ · mor_of_em_cone e ==>
# (mnd_incl B) g₂ · mor_of_em_cone e
H:= fully_faithful_from_equivalence (hom x e)
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) (em_hom_functor e x)
  (He x): fully_faithful (em_hom_functor e x)
cell_of_mnd_cell
  (## (mnd_incl B) is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell
   ▹ mor_of_em_cone e) = cell_of_mnd_cell α

        exact (maponpaths
                 pr1
                 (homotweqinvweq
                    (make_weq _ (H g₁ g₂))
                    is_universal_has_em_ump_2_cell_mnd_cell)).
      Qed.
    End UMP2.
