  (*
   4. Definition via Eilenberg-Moore category
   *)

  (**
   4.1 The functor
   *)
  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
hom x (pr1 m)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
hom x (pr1 m) ⟦ mnd_to_cat_Monad m x ?x, ?x ⟧
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
η (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?x · ?f = id₁ ?x
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
μ (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?x · ?f =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?f · ?f

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
hom x (pr1 m)
 exact (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
hom x (pr1 m)
⟦ mnd_to_cat_Monad m x
    (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)),
f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) ⟧
 exact (rassociator _ _ _ • (_ ◃ (mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e) • lunitor _))).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
η (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
· (rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f
      ◃ (mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)
         • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))) =
id₁ (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite <- lwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite <- rinvunitor_triangle ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         refine (_ @ lwhisker_id2 _ _) ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         pose (mnd_mor_unit (mor_of_em_cone e)) as p ;
         cbn in p ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right in p ;
         exact (!p)).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
μ (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
· (rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f
      ◃ (mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)
         • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))))) =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  (rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f
      ◃ (mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)
         • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))))
· (rassociator f (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (f
      ◃ (mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone e)
         • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite <- lwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         etrans ;
           [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             exact (!(mnd_mor_mu (mor_of_em_cone e)))
           | ] ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite <- rassociator_rassociator ;
         rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite !lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
         rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite <- lunitor_triangle ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
⟦ is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob f,
is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob g ⟧

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
⟦ is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob f,
is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob g ⟧

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
hom x (pr1 m)
⟦ pr11 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob f),
pr11 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob g) ⟧
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
pr21 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob f) · ?f =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?f
· pr21 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob g)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
hom x (pr1 m)
⟦ pr11 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob f),
pr11 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob g) ⟧
 exact (α ▹ _).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e ⟧
α: f ==> g
pr21 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob f)
· (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)) =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  (α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
· pr21 (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob g)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_data (hom x e)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_data (hom x e)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
hom x e → eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
∏ a b : hom x e,
hom x e ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ ?F a,
  ?F b ⟧

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
hom x e → eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
 exact is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob.
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
∏ a b : hom x e,
hom x e ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  ⟦ is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob a,
  is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_ob b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ α, is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_mor α).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_functor (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_functor (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_idax
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_compax
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_idax
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
# (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x) (id₁ f) =
id₁ (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
id₂ f ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) =
id₂ (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
id₂ (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)) =
id₂ (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_compax
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g, h: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom x e ⟦ g, h ⟧
# (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x) (α · β) =
# (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x) α
· # (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x) β

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g, h: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom x e ⟦ g, h ⟧
(α • β) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) =
(α ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))
• (β ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f, g, h: hom x e
α: hom x e ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom x e ⟦ g, h ⟧
(α • β) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e) =
(α • β) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
hom x e ⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
hom x e ⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_data (hom x e)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_functor ?F

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
functor_data (hom x e)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
 exact (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_functor (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_data e x)
 exact (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor_is_functor e x).
  Defined.

  (**
   4.2 The definition
   *)
  Definition is_em_universal_em_cone
             (e : em_cone)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : B), adj_equivalence_of_cats (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x).

  (**
   4.3 It is a proposition
   *)
  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_em_universal_em_cone e)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_em_universal_em_cone e)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t : B,
    adj_equivalence_of_cats
      (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e t)) x)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
UU
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
?X
≃ adj_equivalence_of_cats
    (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
isofhlevel 1 ?X

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
UU
 exact (@left_adjoint_equivalence
               bicat_of_univ_cats
               (univ_hom HB_2_1 x e)
               (eilenberg_moore_univalent_cat
                  (univ_hom HB_2_1 _ _)
                  (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
               (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x)).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
left_adjoint_equivalence
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x)
≃ adj_equivalence_of_cats
    (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x)
 exact (@adj_equiv_is_equiv_cat
               (univ_hom HB_2_1 x e)
               _
               _).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
isofhlevel 1
  (left_adjoint_equivalence
     (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x))
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_of_univ_cats

      exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_1.
  Qed.

  (**
   5. Equivalence to the other two definitions
   *)
  Section EilenbergMooreEquivalence.
    Context (x : B).

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B x) m

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
?f · endo_of_mnd m ==> endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x) · ?f

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
 exact (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h · endo_of_mnd m ==>
endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B x)
· ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
 exact (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h • linvunitor _).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
mnd_mor_laws (eilenberg_moore_to_hom_ob_data h)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
mnd_mor_laws (eilenberg_moore_to_hom_ob_data h)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
• (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
(rinvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
 • (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
((((lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
      (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • ((mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
        • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
       ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
   • rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
       (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (id₁ x
     ◃ (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
        • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))))
 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
• (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
(ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
• (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
(rinvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
 • (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
(rinvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
 • (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
((rinvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  • (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
 • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
• linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
id₂ (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
• linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
((rinvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  • (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
 • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
• linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
id₂ (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
(rinvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
 • (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h

        exact (!(eilenberg_moore_ob_unit h)).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
((((lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
      (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • ((mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
        • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
       ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
   • rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
       (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (id₁ x
     ◃ (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
        • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))))
 • lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
• (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) =
(ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• (((mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
     • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • ((id₁ x
          ◃ (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
             • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)))
         • (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
              (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
            • (lunitor (id₁ x)
               ▹ ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))))) =
(ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• (((mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
     • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • ((id₁ x
          ◃ (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
             • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)))
         • lunitor
             (id₁ x · ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)))) =
(ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• (((mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
     • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (lunitor
           (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h · endo_of_mnd m)
         • (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
            • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))))) =
(ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• (((mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
     • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (lunitor
           (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h · endo_of_mnd m)
         • (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
            • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))))) =
?b
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
?b =
(ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
   • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• (((mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
     • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (lunitor
           (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h · endo_of_mnd m)
         • (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
            • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))))) =
?b

          
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• (lunitor
     (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h · endo_of_mnd m)
   • (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h
      • linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h))) =
?t2

          
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
((rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
    (endo_of_mnd m)
  • lunitor
      (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h · endo_of_mnd m))
 • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
• linvunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
((rassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
    (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (lassociator (id₁ x) (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
       (endo_of_mnd m)
     • (lunitor (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob h)
        ▹ endo_of_mnd m)))

m: mnd B
x: B
h₁, h₂: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)

 exact (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor α).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h₁, h₂: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
α: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ h₁,
h₂ ⟧
is_mnd_cell (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor α)
 abstract
          (unfold is_mnd_cell ; cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
           rewrite <- linvunitor_natural ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           exact (eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor α)).
    Defined.

B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h₁, h₂, h₃: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
α: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ h₁,
h₂ ⟧
β: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ h₂,
h₃ ⟧
# eilenberg_moore_to_hom_data (α · β) =
# eilenberg_moore_to_hom_data α
· # eilenberg_moore_to_hom_data β

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
h₁, h₂, h₃: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
α: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ h₁,
h₂ ⟧
β: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ h₂,
h₃ ⟧
pr11 α • pr11 β =
mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor α
• mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor β

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

η (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?x · ?f = id₁ ?x
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
μ (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?x · ?f =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?f · ?f

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
hom x (pr1 m)
 exact (mor_of_mnd_mor f).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
hom x (pr1 m)
⟦ mnd_to_cat_Monad m x (mor_of_mnd_mor f),
mor_of_mnd_mor f ⟧
 exact (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor _).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
η (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
· (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
id₁ (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           refine (maponpaths (λ z, z • _) (!(mnd_mor_unit f)) @ _) ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           apply linvunitor_lunitor).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
μ (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
· (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
· (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           pose (mnd_mor_mu f) as p ;
           cbn in p ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _) @ _) ;
           refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ • (z • _)) (!p) @ _) ; clear p ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
           rewrite <- vcomp_lunitor ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
α: f ==> g
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
⟦ hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob f,
hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob g ⟧

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
α: f ==> g
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
⟦ hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob f,
hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob g ⟧

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
α: f ==> g
hom x (pr1 m) ⟦ pr11 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob f),
pr11 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob g) ⟧
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
α: f ==> g
pr21 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob f) · ?f =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?f
· pr21 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob g)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
α: f ==> g
hom x (pr1 m) ⟦ pr11 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob f),
pr11 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob g) ⟧
 exact (cell_of_mnd_cell α).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
α: f ==> g
pr21 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob f)
· cell_of_mnd_cell α =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) (cell_of_mnd_cell α)
· pr21 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob g)
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite <- vcomp_lunitor ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           exact (mnd_cell_endo α)).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m
→ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
∏ a b : hom (mnd_incl B x) m,
hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ ?F a,
  ?F b ⟧

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m
→ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
 exact hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
∏ a b : hom (mnd_incl B x) m,
hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  ⟦ hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob a,
  hom_to_eilenberg_moore_ob b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ α, hom_to_eilenberg_moore_mor α).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_functor hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_functor hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_idax hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_compax hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_idax hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
# hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data (id₁ f) =
id₁ (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data f)

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
id₂ (pr1 f) = id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_compax hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g, h: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
α: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ g, h ⟧
# hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data (α · β) =
# hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data α
· # hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data β

        
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g, h: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
α: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ f, g ⟧
β: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ g, h ⟧
pr1 α • pr1 β =
cell_of_mnd_cell α • cell_of_mnd_cell β

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)

m: mnd B
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)

x: B
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))

m: mnd B
x: B
is_functor ?F

m: mnd B
x: B
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
 exact hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_functor hom_to_eilenberg_moore_data
 exact hom_to_eilenberg_moore_is_functor.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
nat_trans_data
  (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)))
  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
nat_trans_data
  (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)))
  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
⟦ functor_identity
    (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)) f,
(eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore) f ⟧

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
hom x (pr1 m)
⟦ pr11 (functor_identity
          (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
          f),
pr11 ((eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)
        f) ⟧
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
pr21 (functor_identity
        (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)) f)
· ?f =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ?f
· pr21 ((eilenberg_moore_to_hom
         ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore) f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
hom x (pr1 m)
⟦ pr11 (functor_identity
          (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
          f),
pr11 ((eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)
        f) ⟧
 exact (id2 _).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
pr21 (functor_identity
        (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)) f)
· id₂
    (pr11 (functor_identity
             (eilenberg_moore_cat
                (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)) f)) =
# (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
  (id₂
     (pr11 (functor_identity
              (eilenberg_moore_cat
                 (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)) f)))
· pr21 ((eilenberg_moore_to_hom
         ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore) f)
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
           rewrite id2_left, id2_right ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)))
  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)
  hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit_data

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)))
  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)
  hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit_data

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
α: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ f, g
⟧
# (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))) α
· hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit_data g =
hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit_data f
· # (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)
    α

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
α: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ f, g
⟧
pr11 α • id₂ (pr11 g) =
id₂ (pr11 f) • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor α

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
α: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x) ⟦ f, g
⟧
pr11 α = mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor α

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_identity
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
⟹ eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore

m: mnd B
x: B
functor_identity
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
⟹ eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore

nat_trans_data
  (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)))
  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)

m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)))
  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore) 
  ?t

x: B
nat_trans_data
  (functor_identity

  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)
 exact hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit_data.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity
     (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)))
  (eilenberg_moore_to_hom ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore)
  hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit_data
 exact hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit_is_nat_trans.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
is_z_isomorphism (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit f)

m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
is_z_isomorphism (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit f)

m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr11 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit f))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr11 (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit f))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
is_invertible_2cell (id₂ (pr11 f))

      is_iso.
    Defined.

m: mnd B
x: B
nat_trans_data
  (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m))

x: B

hom (mnd_incl B x) m
⟦ (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom) f,
functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) f ⟧

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
mnd_cell_data
  ((hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom) f)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) f)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
is_mnd_cell ?τ

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
mnd_cell_data
  ((hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom) f)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m) f)
 exact (id2 _).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
is_mnd_cell
  (id₂
     (mor_of_mnd_mor
        ((hom_to_eilenberg_moore
          ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom) f)))
 abstract
          (unfold is_mnd_cell ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left, id2_right ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lunitor_linvunitor ;
           apply id2_right).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m))
  hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit_data

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m))
  hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit_data

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
α: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ f, g ⟧
# (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom) α
· hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit_data g =
hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit_data f
· # (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)) α

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
α: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ f, g ⟧
cell_of_mnd_cell α • id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor g) =
id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor f) • pr1 α

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B x) m
α: hom (mnd_incl B x) m ⟦ f, g ⟧
cell_of_mnd_cell α = pr1 α

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom
⟹ functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)

m: mnd B
x: B
hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom
⟹ functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)

x: B
nat_trans_data
  (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m))
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)) ?t

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
nat_trans_data
  (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m))
 exact hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit_data.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (hom_to_eilenberg_moore ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom)
  (functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m))
  hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit_data
 exact hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit_is_nat_trans.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit f)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (cell_of_mnd_cell (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit f))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
f: mnd B ⟦ mnd_incl B x, m ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

      is_iso.
    Defined.
  End EilenbergMooreEquivalence.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
equivalence_of_cats
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
equivalence_of_cats
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)

m: mnd B
x: B
adjunction_data
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
forms_equivalence ?adjData

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
adjunction_data
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
  (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
⟶ hom (mnd_incl B x) m
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_identity
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
⟹ ?F ∙ ?G
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
?G ∙ ?F ⟹ functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
⟶ hom (mnd_incl B x) m
 exact (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
hom (mnd_incl B x) m
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x)
 exact (hom_to_eilenberg_moore x).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
functor_identity
  (eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x))
⟹ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x ∙ hom_to_eilenberg_moore x
 exact (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit x).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
hom_to_eilenberg_moore x ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x
⟹ functor_identity (hom (mnd_incl B x) m)
 exact (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit x).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
forms_equivalence
  (make_adjunction_data (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
     (hom_to_eilenberg_moore x)
     (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit x)
     (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit x))
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
∏ a : eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x),
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (make_adjunction_data (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit x)) a)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
∏ b : hom (mnd_incl B x) m,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (make_adjunction_data (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit x)) b)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
∏ a : eilenberg_moore_cat (mnd_to_cat_Monad m x),
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (make_adjunction_data (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit x)) a)
 exact (is_z_iso_hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit x).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
x: B
∏ b : hom (mnd_incl B x) m,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (make_adjunction_data (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_unit x)
        (hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit x)) b)
 exact (is_z_iso_hom_to_eilenberg_moore_counit x).
  Defined.

  Definition eilenberg_moore_adj_equiv_mnd_incl
             (x : B)
    : adj_equivalence_of_cats (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
    := adjointification (eilenberg_moore_equiv_mnd_incl x).

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x ⟹ em_hom_functor e x

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x ⟹ em_hom_functor e x

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
nat_trans_data
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
   ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) (em_hom_functor e x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
   ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) (em_hom_functor e x) 
  ?t

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
nat_trans_data
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
   ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) (em_hom_functor e x)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
hom (mnd_incl B x) m
⟦ (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
   ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) f, em_hom_functor e x f
⟧

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
mnd_cell_data
  ((is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
    ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) f)
  (em_hom_functor e x f)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
is_mnd_cell ?τ

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
mnd_cell_data
  ((is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
    ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) f)
  (em_hom_functor e x f)
 apply id2.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
is_mnd_cell
  (id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor (em_hom_functor e x f)))
 abstract
          (unfold is_mnd_cell ; cbn ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left, id2_right ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_nat_trans
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
   ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) (em_hom_functor e x)
  ((λ f : hom x e,
    make_mnd_cell
      (id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor (em_hom_functor e x f)))
      (eilenberg_moore_adj_mnd_incl_nat_trans_subproof
         e x f))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
      ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) (em_hom_functor e x))
 abstract
        (intros f g α ;
         use eq_mnd_cell ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite id2_left, id2_right ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
nat_z_iso
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
   ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) (em_hom_functor e x)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
nat_z_iso
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
   ∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x) (em_hom_functor e x)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x ⟹ em_hom_functor e x
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x
∙ eilenberg_moore_to_hom x ⟹ em_hom_functor e x
 exact (eilenberg_moore_adj_mnd_incl_nat_trans e x).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
is_nat_z_iso
  (eilenberg_moore_adj_mnd_incl_nat_trans e x)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
is_z_isomorphism
  (eilenberg_moore_adj_mnd_incl_nat_trans e x f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
is_invertible_2cell
  (eilenberg_moore_adj_mnd_incl_nat_trans e x f)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
is_invertible_2cell
  (cell_of_mnd_cell
     (eilenberg_moore_adj_mnd_incl_nat_trans e x f))

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
e: em_cone
x: B
f: hom x e
is_invertible_2cell
  (id₂ (f · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone e)))

      is_iso.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_universal_em_cone e ≃ is_em_universal_em_cone e

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_universal_em_cone e ≃ is_em_universal_em_cone e

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_universal_em_cone e → is_em_universal_em_cone e
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_em_universal_em_cone e → is_universal_em_cone e
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_universal_em_cone e)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_em_universal_em_cone e)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_universal_em_cone e → is_em_universal_em_cone e
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats (em_hom_functor e x)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
 apply eilenberg_moore_adj_equiv_mnd_incl.
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats (em_hom_functor e x)
 exact (He x).
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_em_universal_em_cone e → is_universal_em_cone e
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_em_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats (em_hom_functor e x)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_em_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x)
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_em_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)

      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_em_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (is_em_universal_em_cone_functor e x)
 exact (He x).
      
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
He: is_em_universal_em_cone e
x: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats (eilenberg_moore_to_hom x)
 apply eilenberg_moore_adj_equiv_mnd_incl.
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_universal_em_cone e)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB_2_1.
    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
isaprop (is_em_universal_em_cone e)
 
B: bicat
m: mnd B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
e: em_cone
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB_2_1.
  Defined.
End EMObject.

(**
 6. Bicategories with Eilenberg-Moore objects
 *)
Definition bicat_has_em
           (B : bicat)
  : UU
  := ∏ (m : mnd B),
     ∑ (e : em_cone m), has_em_ump m e.
